blocks.text: What Is an AI Image Prompt?
An AI image prompt is a natural language description that instructs an AI model what to generate. Better prompts generally produce better images.

blocks.title: Example Prompt
blocks.prompt: A majestic white tiger walking through a misty bamboo forest at sunrise, cinematic lighting, 85mm lens, ultra realistic, HDR, shallow depth of field, 8K.

blocks.text: Subject + Environment + Style + Lighting + Camera + Composition + Quality Modifiers
The Anatomy of a Great Prompt
The subject is the main object, person or scene. Be descriptive and specific.
Choose an artistic style to influence the overall appearance.
Lighting dramatically changes realism and emotion.
Quality modifiers enhance detail and clarity.

items: Expecting perfect results on the first try

blocks.text: Iterate on prompts. Change one variable at a time to understand how each keyword influences the generated image.

seo.title: Prompt Engineering Tips for AI Images (2026 Guide)
seo.description: Master AI image prompt engineering with practical tips, prompt formulas, examples, lighting, composition and optimization techniques.

blocks.text: Prompt engineering is the process of writing clear, structured instructions that help AI image models generate images closer to your vision. Small improvements in wording can dramatically change the final result.
Whether you create marketing graphics, fantasy artwork, portraits or product photography, these techniques will help you produce more consistent and higher-quality images.
Subject + Environment + Style + Lighting + Camera + Composition + Quality Modifiers

blocks.title: Example
blocks.prompt: Elegant woman in a modern art museum, cinematic photography, golden hour lighting, Canon EOS R5, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, ultra realistic, HDR, 8K.

blocks.text: Replace generic nouns with descriptive details. Mention age, clothing, colors, materials, expressions, weather or architecture where relevant.
Describe the environment to give context and improve storytelling.
Change only one element at a time to understand which keywords influence the output.
Maintain a personal prompt library grouped by subject, style and lighting for faster future projects.
Analyze successful images and reuse their structure in new prompts instead of starting from scratch.

blocks.text: Tips for Better Anime AI Prompts

rows: Describe hair and eyes in detail
messy dark wavy hair, glowing electric blue eyes
volumetric blue fog, golden-hour, cinematic contrast
no blurry, no bad anatomy, no extra limbs
Solo Leveling aesthetic, Pixar-style, Studio Ghibli feel

items: Being too vague about the art style (say 'retro cel-shaded anime' not just 'anime')
Forgetting to describe the character's expression
Not specifying lighting — it dramatically changes mood
Mixing incompatible styles in one prompt
Leaving out quality modifiers like 8K or masterpiece
Not using negative prompts to avoid bad anatomy

blocks.title: Pro Tip
blocks.text: Reference a known anime aesthetic in your prompt — such as 'Solo Leveling style', 'Studio Ghibli feel', or '90s retro cel-shaded' — to instantly steer the AI toward a recognizable visual style.

blocks.text: Tips for Better Photorealistic AI Prompts

rows: Controls depth of field and perspective distortion
Golden hour, volumetric fog, rim lighting, neon glow, Rembrandt lighting
Defines the mood, shadow depth, and highlights
Soft mist, floating dust particles, rain-slicked ground, light leaks
Adds texture, depth, and realism to the environment
Shallow depth of field, sharp focus, high contrast, 8K resolution
Instructs the model to mimic high-end DSLR cameras

items: Using generic quality buzzwords like 'photorealistic' without specifying camera or lighting details.
Forgetting to define the direction and type of light (e.g., golden hour or harsh sunlight).
Leaving out the background environment, resulting in a flat or studio-looking backdrop.
Using conflicting lens instructions, which confuses the generator's focal perspective.

blocks.title: Pro Tip
blocks.text: To achieve maximum realism, describe physical textures rather than just using quality modifiers. For example, mention 'pore-level skin texture', 'fine fabric weaves', or 'scratched metallic surfaces' to force the AI to render intricate micro-details.

items.question: Which AI generator is best for photorealistic images?
items.answer: FLUX and Midjourney are currently leading in photorealism, particularly for skin textures, text rendering, and complex lighting. Gemini AI also excels at realistic portraits and cinematic compositions.

items.question: How do I control the blur in the background?
items.answer: Use camera terms like 'shallow depth of field', 'f/1.8 aperture', or 'bokeh background' in your prompts to create a soft, blurred background that highlights the subject.

items.question: Do these prompts work across different AI models?
items.answer: Yes, these prompts are designed to be universally understood by Midjourney, Gemini, FLUX, and Stable Diffusion, though each model will add its own unique stylistic flavor.
